last_commit.message: feat: TweetDetail API for x.com content extraction — 13 links enriched

recent_changes: TweetDetail API: browser-based GraphQL extraction for x.com articles/tweets (13 links enriched, 3 articles + 10 tweets)
enrich_links.py: --browser-import flag for x.com content, exports xcom_pending.json for browser extraction
New script: xcom_tweetdetail_extractor.js — reusable TweetDetail + article Draft.js parser
Data bridge: get_page_text workaround for extracting large JSON from browser (CSP blocks blob/fetch to localhost)
Analysis re-run with x.com enrichment: ACT_NOW 2->3, EXPERIMENT 7->5 (better classification with linked content)
Bookmark fetch 2026-02-26: 13 NEW tweets, enrichment, analysis, vault export (494 tweets, 484 notes)
known_issues: 4 tweets have empty text — genuinely attachment-only replies, not a parsing bug
Quote tweets not captured in schema or extraction (only quote_count stored)
x.com photo/video URLs (20 remaining) need vision analysis, not text enrichment
17+ media items lack vision analysis — limited by missing local_path
Obsidian v1.11.7 installed — needs update to 1.12+ for CLI support
Briefing generator produces double @@ in author handles
Pre-compact hook may not capture enough structured context (only STATUS.json)
